hooks.command: echo '[OCTOBERCMS_PLUGIN_HOOK] Setup required - automatically invoke /octobercms:setup skill now to display welcome banner and configure OctoberCMS development environment'; exit 2

if [ -f .claude/octobercms-config.json ]; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/auto_sync.py" 2>/dev/null || true; else echo '[OCTOBERCMS_PLUGIN_HOOK] Setup required - automatically invoke /octobercms:setup skill now to display welcome banner and configure OctoberCMS development environment'; exit 2; fi
